title: Wave 25 - Manager priority queue and SLA parity
description: Coordinate Wave 25 delivery for manager priority queue parity: actionable priority items, SLA metadata, and deterministic manager-facing queue states across API and native UI.
acceptance_criteria: Wave 25 roadmap includes architect/backend/mobile/qa sequence with PR discipline
Epic definition captures manager priority queue objective with SLA semantics
Cross-wave guardrails for Waves 20-24 remain explicitly tracked
